testsuite.name: com.bookService.settlement.service.SettlementServiceIntegrationTest

testcase.name: 판매자 2명 주문 → 각자 몫만큼 정산되고 완결 통지에 orderId가 담긴다
중복 전달(재처리)이어도 잔액은 그대로고 완결 통지는 다시 반환된다 — 원본의 재통지 설계 유지
한 판매자에게 항목 2개 → 같은 판매자 몫은 합산되어 한 번에 정산된다
items가 비어 있어도 크래시 없이 완결 통지는 반환된다

testsuite.system-out: 2026-07-15T04:48:55.988+09:00 INFO 8456 --- [settlement-worker] [ Test worker] t.c.s.AnnotationConfigContextLoaderUtils : Could not detect default configuration classes for test class [com.bookService.settlement.service.SettlementServiceIntegrationTest]: SettlementServiceIntegrationTest does not declare any static, non-private, non-final, nested classes annotated with @Configuration. 2026-07-15T04:48:55.991+09:00 INFO 8456 --- [settlement-worker] [ Test worker] .b.t.c.SpringBootTestContextBootstrapper : Found @SpringBootConfiguration com.bookService.settlement.SettlementWorkerApplication for test class com.bookService.settlement.service.SettlementServiceIntegrationTest 2026-07-15T04:48:56.009+09:00 INFO 8456 --- [settlement-worker] [ Test worker] c.b.s.service.SellerWalletCreditor : 판매자 지갑 정산 완료: orderId=settle-svc-test-6f822933-4a80-4817-9bca-4373982b221a, sellerId=910000001, amount=12000 2026-07-15T04:48:56.018+09:00 INFO 8456 --- [settlement-worker] [ Test worker] c.b.s.service.SellerWalletCreditor : 판매자 지갑 정산 완료: orderId=settle-svc-test-6f822933-4a80-4817-9bca-4373982b221a, sellerId=910000002, amount=8000 2026-07-15T04:48:56.046+09:00 INFO 8456 --- [settlement-worker] [ Test worker] c.b.s.service.SellerWalletCreditor : 판매자 지갑 정산 완료: orderId=settle-svc-test-175a7716-fd53-449a-9503-bb36d95d86c8, sellerId=910000004, amount=7000 2026-07-15T04:48:56.051+09:00 INFO 8456 --- [settlement-worker] [ Test worker] c.b.s.service.SellerWalletCreditor : 이미 정산된 판매자 몫 ? 중복 전달 skip: orderId=settle-svc-test-175a7716-fd53-449a-9503-bb36d95d86c8, sellerId=910000004 2026-07-15T04:48:56.071+09:00 INFO 8456 --- [settlement-worker] [ Test worker] c.b.s.service.SellerWalletCreditor : 판매자 지갑 정산 완료: orderId=settle-svc-test-62e078f3-c637-4bec-920b-7f8af244cab4, sellerId=910000003, amount=8000
